title: You Deleted Everything and AWS Is Still Charging You
summary: AWS Developers provides a step-by-step checklist for avoiding surprise charges after deleting AWS resources. The guide identifies common sources of residual billing like RDS snapshots, EBS volumes, elastic IPs, and NAT gateways, and recommends setting up billing alarms as a monitoring strategy.
